reasoning: The control IA-5 (1) focuses on password-based authentication management, specifically enforcing a minimum password length. Kubernetes itself does not manage user passwords directly as it relies on external identity providers for authentication, such as LDAP, OIDC, or cloud IAM services. Therefore, password policy management is not directly applicable within Kubernetes. Instead, the focus in Kubernetes is on configuring RBAC for authorization and ensuring secure authentication mechanisms are in place, such as OIDC or service account tokens.
title: Authenticator Management | Password-based Authentication
